final:
module top_module(
    input wire clka,
    input wire wea,
    input wire [6:0] addra,
    input wire [31:0] dina,
    output reg [31:0] douta  // Changed 'wire' to 'reg'
);reg [31:0] mem_storage[0:127];

always @(posedge clka) begin
    if (wea) begin
        mem_storage[addra] <= dina;
    end
    douta <= mem_storage[addra];  // This is valid now as douta is reg
end

endmodule
